name: web-search
description: Perform broad internet research across websites, reviews, and news.
user-invocable: false
---

# Web Search Skill

Use this skill when broad internet research is required.

Use English field labels in structured outputs, but prioritize Indonesian sources and Indonesian owner reviews.

## Sources to Search

- automotive media websites
- manufacturer websites
- blogs and review sites
- news articles
- dealership and pricing sites
- tax and ownership-cost references
- owner review pages

Prefer Indonesian websites, Indonesian automotive media, Indonesian reviewers, and Indonesian owner communities whenever available.

## Search Strategy

Search using multiple keyword variations.

Examples:

Toyota Innova Zenix review Indonesia  
Toyota Innova Zenix reliability  
Toyota Innova Zenix owner experience
Toyota Innova Zenix pajak tahunan
Toyota Innova Zenix ground clearance
Toyota Innova Zenix kamera 360
Toyota Innova Zenix adaptive cruise control
Toyota Innova Zenix review pengguna

## Goal

Collect factual information and reviewer insights from multiple independent sources.

Build a per-variant research matrix covering price, dimensions, specs, fuel use, suspension, tires, features, ADAS, ownership cost, after-sales, spare parts, and sourced user reviews.

If additional related information is important for the review, include it.
